'''fazama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yack|yack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yack|yack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fazama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzæmæth|fæzæmæth]] || [[word:fæzæmæj|fæzæmæj]] || [[word:fæzæmæsh|fæzæmæsh]] || [[word:fæzæmæ|fæzæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazazamath|fazazamath]] || [[word:fazazamaj|fazazamaj]] || [[word:fazazamash|fazazamash]] || [[word:fazazama|fazazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazamath|fazamath]] || [[word:fazamaj|fazamaj]] || [[word:fazamash|fazamash]] || [[word:fazama|fazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazafmath|fazafmath]] || [[word:fazafmaj|fazafmaj]] || [[word:fazafmash|fazafmash]] || [[word:fazafmaf|fazafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazamatha|fazamatha]] || [[word:fazamaja|fazamaja]] || [[word:fazamasha|fazamasha]] || [[word:fazamaka|fazamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazamath|fazamath]] || [[word:fazamaj|fazamaj]] || [[word:fazamash|fazamash]] || [[word:fazama|fazama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazamathal|fazamathal]] || [[word:fazamajal|fazamajal]] || [[word:fazamashal|fazamashal]] || [[word:fazamakal|fazamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazamathatha|fazamathatha]] || [[word:fazamajaja|fazamajaja]] || [[word:fazamashasha|fazamashasha]] || [[word:fazamaka|fazamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazamathan|fazamathan]] || [[word:fazamajan|fazamajan]] || [[word:fazamashan|fazamashan]] || [[word:fazamakan|fazamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazamathaoro|fazamathaoro]] || [[word:fazamajaoro|fazamajaoro]] || [[word:fazamashaoro|fazamashaoro]] || [[word:fazamakaoro|fazamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
